issues.description: Missing condition: 'If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand' → condition should be {"type":"HandCount","player":"opponent","value":5,"comparison":">=" } or similar. Currently uses Always, which ignores the hand size requirement.

DSL only implements one choice ('trash 1 card') but card text offers two distinct choices connected by OR. Must represent both options, typically as separate effect objects or with a choice mechanism. Second option 'Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3 cost during this turn' is completely missing.
Second choice requires PowerBoost action with negative value and duration constraint: {"type":"PowerBoost","target":"opponentCharacter","count":1,"value":-3,"duration":"DuringThisTurn"}

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand, choose one: • Your opponent trashes 1 card from their hand. • Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3 cost during this turn.
